name: Palm Beach County School District
about: Palm Beach County School District is the fifth-largest school district in Florida and among the largest in the United States, serving approximately 190,000 students across more than 180 schools in Palm Beach County, Florida.
calendarNotes: Palm Beach County School District covers a large geographic area from the Atlantic coast to Lake Okeechobee, serving communities from affluent coastal suburbs to rural agricultural towns — and school schedules reflect that diversity. The school year typically begins in mid-August. Spring Break dates are broadly aligned with neighboring Broward County, though South Florida families coordinating schedules should always verify both calendars before booking travel. The area's seasonal population — residents who split time between Palm Beach and the Northeast — often affects school event attendance patterns during winter months. Families new to the county should confirm school assignments early, as feeder patterns differ significantly by zip code.
